# Tokenizer API

> Control-plane API for deploying and managing ERC-20/ERC-721 tokens via the Moonwell Factory.

- [Getting Started](/getting-started/)
- [Authentication](/getting-started/authentication)
- [Errors](/getting-started/errors)
- [Deploy Token Guide](/guides/deploy-token)
- [Manage Token Guide](/guides/manage-token)
- [Media Guide](/guides/media)
- [Token URI Guide](/guides/token-uri)
- [API Reference — Auth](/reference/auth)
- [API Reference — Tokens](/reference/tokens)
- [Full LLM Context](/llms-full.txt)
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://api-rho-gold-msx2gnbkee.vercel.app/openapi/json)
